title: MCBWE
description: Just a silly Resource Pack that gives minecart command blocks cat ears!
body:
# MCBWE (Minecart Command Blocks With Ears)
**WARNING: This pack requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work! you can get it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)!**

---
**This pack also works on optifine without mods! (just thought it would be useful to add that)**

---

This is just a silly pack i made for fun.\
I was just playing on my server with random people, and someone spawned in a command block minecart and an idea poped up into my head "what if it had cat ears?" and here we are!

This pack adds ears to command block minecarts\
thats it i guess...?

![Command Block Minecart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b7c76586cafd43d6273b127417bd635489bb70.png)

its also customisable\
inside the zip go to assets/minecraft/textures/entity/minecart\
and here you should find accesory.png\
its a 64 by 64 file\
from 0, 0 to 19, 10 is front from 20, 0 to 40, 10 is the back

you have my permission to redistribute edited product just give me some credit!
